title: Auro Design System by Alaska Airlines
content: # Alaska Airlines Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe Auro from Directories: Components: Auro Design System is a comprehensive framework crafted to ensure consistency and excellence in digital experiences across Alaska Airlines aviation services. Design System is founded on four guiding principles: Simplicity, Consistency, Relevance, and Engagement. These pillars collectively foster a seamless user experience while upholding the essence of brand identity. Accessibility Color System Icons Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Combobox Data table Date picker Dialog Drawer Dropdown Icon Link Menus Popover Radio button Select Sidebar Snackbar Text field
